overall.description: Atmospheric nighttime footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a foggy overlook of Night City's neon skyline, transitioning to a moonlit sky pan, then moving through the Badlands desert terrain among Joshua trees with distant city lights visible in the background.

events.description: camera begins tilting upward from city view toward the night sky

agents.ego_description: standing on a desert hilltop overlooking the distant neon-lit city through the fog

entered.detail: sprawling cyberpunk cityscape with scattered neon lights visible through heavy fog
tall corporate tower with distinctive vertical red lighting
illuminated advertisement sign with red and blue neon colors
rocky desert ground at the edge of a cliff overlooking the city

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a foggy hilltop overlooking Night City. The Arasaka tower rises in the distance with its signature red lighting, while neon billboards glow through the haze. The camera stands still, observing the cityscape before beginning to tilt upward toward the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open night sky with full moon

events.description: view transitions from cityscape to open night sky with moon
camera begins tilting down from the sky toward the desert landscape

agents.ego_description: panning across the hazy night sky to observe the bright moon

entered.detail: bright full moon glowing through the atmospheric haze
dark teal night sky filled with fog and atmospheric particles

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts up from the city to reveal a hazy night sky dominated by a bright full moon. The atmospheric fog creates a glowing halo around the moon as the camera pans across the sky, transitioning from the urban environment to the natural celestial view.

events.description: view transitions from sky to desert landscape with joshua trees
begins walking forward through the desert terrain passing joshua trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the desert badlands among silhouetted joshua trees with the city lights visible in the distant valley

entered.detail: silhouetted desert tree with distinctive spiky branches against the night sky
rocky desert hillside with sparse dry vegetation
faint glow of city lights visible in the valley below

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts down from the sky to reveal the desert Badlands landscape. Moving forward through the terrain, the camera passes among silhouetted Joshua trees while the distant glow of Night City remains visible in the background. The scene maintains a cool, atmospheric teal tint throughout the moonlit desert walk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a foggy urban overlook into a moonlit desert expanse. It begins on a hilltop overlooking Night City, where the Arasaka tower and neon billboards glow through a dense haze. As the camera tilts upward, the urban landscape gives way to a hazy night sky dominated by a bright full moon surrounded by a glowing halo. The scene then shifts as the camera tilts back down to reveal the Badlands, moving forward through a cool, teal-tinted desert terrain. Finally, the camera glides past silhouetted Joshua trees while the distant glow of the city remains visible on the horizon.
